perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is eating a green grape and then holds up two grapes to the camera with a cheerful expression. (2) She holds a large, fresh bunch of green grapes and then pours a bowl of them into clear water to wash them. (3) She proceeds to prepare a salad on a wooden table, slicing grapes in half, arranging lettuce on a plate, adding a whole burrata cheese, tearing up pieces of ham, sprinkling crushed walnuts, and drizzling olive oil and balsamic glaze. (4) She cuts the cheese open, takes a bite of the salad, and gives a satisfied thumbs-up. (5) She shows an alternative presentation using grape and ham skewers. (6) She sits at a table talking directly to the camera, gesturing with her hands, then points to a bunch of grapes and holds a single grape while text bubbles appear. (7) Close-up shots of sliced grapes and her eating are shown intermittently.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music with a light synthesizer melody starts. A clear crunching sound is heard as the woman eats a grape. (2) A female voice begins speaking in Mandarin with a friendly and energetic tone. Sounds of water splashing and rhythmic knife cutting on a board are integrated into the BGM. (3) Occasional 'ding' and sparkle-like sound effects play during text transitions. (4) A male narrator's voice joins, providing informative details in a professional yet enthusiastic tone, while the BGM remains consistent. (5) Ambient kitchen sounds are minimal, with a clean studio-like recording quality throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional and decorative text: '用葡萄做超好吃的油醋沙拉' (Make a delicious vinaigrette salad with grapes). (2) Functional numbering: '步驟一' to '步驟九' (Step 1 to Step 9) marking the preparation phases. (3) Hook text: '完成!!' (Finished!!), '豪豪吃!!' (So delicious!!), and '華麗' (Gorgeous). (4) Brand and informational text: '今天使用的是加州葡萄' (Using California Grapes today), '富含多酚、抗氧化物' (Rich in polyphenols and antioxidants), '守護心臟、大腦' (Protects heart and brain), '超過80種品種' (Over 80 varieties), and '加州陽光的精華' (Essence of California sunshine).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Step-by-step Recipe -> Tasting & Alternative Recipe -> Product Benefits & Brand Endorsement -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a white button-down shirt over a pink and white striped camisole and a star-pendant necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern domestic kitchen featuring light-colored wooden tables, white cabinetry, a sink, and a stainless steel refrigerator.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Process -> Synthesis -> Informational Endorsement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional advertisement for California Grapes. It utilizes a lifestyle cooking tutorial format to showcase the versatility and quality of the product (making a grape burrata salad) before transitioning into a detailed explanation of the product's nutritional benefits and availability to encourage consumer purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal mention of '加州葡萄' (California Grapes), extensive text overlays describing product benefits, and high-quality product shots specifically for branding.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density colorful text overlays and a mix of first-person recipe execution with professional narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'ASMR' eating sounds and aesthetic food preparation shots to maintain high viewer retention before delivering the core marketing message.
